title: Many Happy Returns
writer: Lady Mary Cameron, J.P. McEvoy, Claude Binyon
actors: George Burns, Gracie Allen, George Barbier
plot: Gracie Allen assumes the "management" of the shop owned by her papa Horatio Allen, turning it into a radio station and then an aviary, with the usual Gracie Allen logic. While distracted, Papa is trying to get younger daughter, be...
